query:
UPDATE backlinks SET 
  sourceUrl = CASE
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook%' THEN 'https://facebook.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb%' THEN 'https://bbb.org'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin%' THEN 'https://linkedin.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp%' THEN 'https://yelp.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest%' THEN 'https://mapquest.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owens%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%corning%' THEN 'https://owenscorning.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dun%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb%' THEN 'https://dnb.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom%' THEN 'https://buildzoom.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%homefex%' THEN 'https://homefex.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi%' THEN 'https://angi.com'
    ELSE sourceUrl
  END
WHERE sourceUrl NOT LIKE 'https://%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Vqx4SDKYST7k6m.root --database Da8Aqq7vdypxzx6Gdf6sLN --execute UPDATE backlinks SET 
  sourceUrl = CASE
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook%' THEN 'https://facebook.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb%' THEN 'https://bbb.org'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin%' THEN 'https://linkedin.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp%' THEN 'https://yelp.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest%' THEN 'https://mapquest.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owens%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%corning%' THEN 'https://owenscorning.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dun%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb%' THEN 'https://dnb.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom%' THEN 'https://buildzoom.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%homefex%' THEN 'https://homefex.com'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi%' THEN 'https://angi.com'
    ELSE sourceUrl
  END
WHERE sourceUrl NOT LIKE 'https://%';
